text:
--- apache20    2009-02-10 11:25:51.000000000 -0500
+++ apache20_edit       2009-02-10 11:27:38.000000000 -0500
@@ -1,2 +1,5 @@
+You must have output from the 'hostname' command in your /etc/hosts file
+for apache to start properly.
+
 To run apache www server from startup, add apache2_enable="YES"
 in your /etc/rc.conf. Extra options can be found in startup script.

Fix: 

See above.
